description: Fix review issues: referral link dead end (capture ?ref= param on login page), revenue calculation (show test attempts instead of fake revenue), referral code collision (retry loop), and reward detection inconsistency (standardize on paymentId: null).
steps: 1. Fix login page to capture ?ref= param from URL, store in localStorage. After successful sign-in, the referral code is consumed by calling POST /api/referral.
2. Fix referral code generation to add a retry loop (up to 3 tries) on unique constraint violation.
3. Fix teacher stats revenue to show test attempts count instead of inflated price * results.
4. Standardize reward detection in GET /api/referral to use paymentId: null (same as check-reward).
acceptance_criteria: Login page captures ?ref= param and stores it in localStorage
After login, referral code is consumed by calling POST /api/referral
Referral code generation retries on collision
Teacher stats no longer multiplies price by result count
GET /api/referral uses paymentId: null for reward detection (same as check-reward)
